nodes.name: LLM Call 1 (T=0.0)
nodes.notes: Self-consistency run 1 of 3. Temperature 0.0 (deterministic anchor). Output fed into LLM Call 2.

nodes.name: LLM Call 2 (T=0.3)
nodes.notes: Self-consistency run 2 of 3. Temperature 0.3 (slight variation). Always reads original pair from Split In Batches.

nodes.name: LLM Call 3 (T=0.5)
nodes.notes: Self-consistency run 3 of 3. Temperature 0.5 (most varied). Output feeds Self Consistency Check.

nodes.name: Self Consistency Check
nodes.notes: Reads all 3 LLM run results. Applies guardrails (confidence gate, hedge-word detection, valid-enum check) to each. Tallies votes. All-agree → full confidence. 2/3 → −0.08 penalty. No majority → MANUAL_REVIEW at 0.30. Stores consistency_votes for audit trail.

nodes.name: Fetch All Criteria1
nodes.notes: Fetch all confirmed criteria for this tender.

nodes.name: Fetch All Evidence1
nodes.notes: Fetches ALL evidence for this tender in one call.

nodes.name: Build Evidence-Criterion Pairs1
nodes.notes: Joins criteria and evidence into flat pairs. Now also forwards comparison_operator from criterion definition.

nodes.name: Rule Layer1
nodes.notes: GENERIC rule engine. Handles all numeric/financial/compliance types via comparison_operator (or inferred ceiling/minimum). No hardcoded criterion names. Certification parsed dynamically from threshold/description. boolean detection uses broad keyword set. Technical tries numeric first. date/text/qualitative always route to LLM. Unreachable code bug fixed.

nodes.name: Needs LLM?1
nodes.notes: Routes to LLM self-consistency chain only when rules couldn't decide. FALSE path = rule gave a clear verdict.

nodes.name: Assemble Verdict Record1
nodes.notes: Merges rule and LLM paths into one canonical VerdictRecord. Now also forwards consistency_votes for audit.

nodes.name: POST Verdict to FastAPI1
nodes.notes: FastAPI writes to verdict_events (append-only). UI dashboard updates when it polls GET /verdicts?tender_id=.

nodes.name: Back to Split In Batches1
nodes.notes: Routes back into the Split In Batches loop for the next pair.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "tender_id": "{{ $('Loop Complete1').item.json.tender_id }}",
  "event_type": "evidence_extraction_complete",
  "actor": "n8n_wf4",
  "entity_type": "tender",
  "entity_id": "{{ $('Loop Complete1').item.json.tender_id }}",
  "detail": "Verdict engine completed for {{ $('Loop Complete1').item.json.bidder_ids.length }} bidder(s): {{ $('Loop Complete1').item.json.bidder_ids.join(', ') }} at {{ $('Loop Complete1').item.json.completed_at }}"
}

nodes.name: Notify Evaluation Complete1
nodes.notes: FastAPI updates tender status to verdicts_ready.
